theorem: Theorem 6 (Disjoint-Variable Composition): If patterns P_i have Vars(P_i) ∩ Vars(P_j) = ∅, then ghb(P) = ⋃ ghb(P_i), and P is safe iff all P_i are safe.
proposition: Proposition 7 (Shared-Variable Unsafety): When patterns share variables, individual safety does NOT guarantee program safety. Conservative analysis flags shared-variable interactions.
